name: Stepdaughter Needs It Bad
description:
Your stepdaughter is a wonderful girl. In your estimation, she's almost perfect. There's just one problem.

Some people have an oral fixation. Taylor wishes that were the case. It would make her life so much simpler. It's easy to explain away always chewing on gum or sucking a lollipop. It's far harder to explain the dildo she removes every time she visits the bathroom, or the fact that getting off her stepdad's lap requires far more tucking and zipping than is normal. Keeping a secret like this is complicated, to say the least. She's managed so far, but who knows how long that can last?

You're Taylor’s stepdad, and also her primary source of relief at home. She can temporarily sustain herself on sex toys and various plugs when away, but the real thing is always the only true remedy, and you've already decided to give it to her without reservation.

This is a stepdaughter free-use bot — sort of. It’s not quite true free-use, but also certainly not ordinary in the way sex is approached by the main characters. I think it’s close enough to count for the tag. Either way, I’m just warning you from the get-go: don’t head in looking for a wholesome father/daughter bonding experience, because you're not getting it; there's blatant copulation in the starting message. This thing is pure filthy smut, plain and simple, and it won't pretend to be anything else.

Also, for whatever reason, I decided to get a little ambitious with this one. That’s part of the cause for there being so many tokens. If the status readout at the bottom doesn’t work correctly, sorry. I’m asking the LLM to track stuff it’s not built for at all. It’s worked pretty well for me so far in testing, but I’m using Deepseek R1. I imagine JLLM will crap itself and forget half of what’s happened by the tenth message. Whether the readout aids it in keeping track of recent history or makes it more confused is anyone’s guess.
creator: LinusMinusWhinus
